title: GPU hfft/ihfft + fft2/ifft2 + fftn/ifftn via cuFFT plan2d/3d
description:
Spun out from #605 partial close (pad/truncate landed). Remaining cuFFT tail:

A. hfft / ihfft (1-D Hermitian FFT) — wire on top of existing gpu_irfft_c2r_* / gpu_rfft_r2c_* with a sign-flip kernel.

B. fft2 / ifft2 / rfft2 / irfft2 — use cufftPlan2d directly.

C. fftn / ifftn / rfftn / irfftn — use cufftPlan3d for 3-D, cufftPlanMany for arbitrary rank.

Each piece needs new bindings in ferrotorch-gpu/src/cufft.rs + dispatch wiring.
